overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a Mediterranean-style coastal landscape during golden hour. The character walks from rocky inland terrain through a narrow passage to a beach, follows the shoreline past a beached boat, and turns back toward ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path approaching ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky dirt path toward distant ancient stone ruins

entered.detail: ruined stone archway standing atop the rocky hill in the distance
large weathered rock formations lining the left side of the path
large weathered rock formations lining the right side of the path
sparse dry bushes and shrubs scattered along the rocky terrain
tight rock walls of the narrow passage
tight rock walls of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dry rocky coastal path during golden hour, approaching ancient stone ruins visible in the distance. The terrain is enclosed by rocky cliffs on both sides, with sparse dry vegetation, leading into a narrow rock passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from rock passage to open beach

events.description: exits narrow rock passage onto open beach with ocean visible ahead

agents.ego_description: emerging from the narrow passage and stepping onto the sandy beach

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water visible beyond the beach
sandy beach leading down to the waterline
rocky cliffs continuing along the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character exits the narrow rock passage onto an open beach during golden hour. The ocean becomes visible in the distance, with sandy terrain underfoot and rocky cliffs lining the right side of the shore.

events.description: steps from dry sand into shallow ocean water

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach and entering the shallow surf at the water's edge

entered.detail: clear shallow water lapping against the shore
rocky cliffs now on the left side as the character follows the shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the shoreline, transitioning from dry sand to shallow ocean water. Rocky cliffs line the left side while the open sea stretches to the horizon on the right, with waves gently lapping at the character's feet.

events.description: distant ships become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow coastal water along the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: small boats or ships visible on the distant horizon
colorful wooden fishing boat washed up on the shore ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues wading through the clear shallow water along the coast. Distant ships appear on the horizon, and a colorful beached fishing boat becomes visible ahead on the right, washed up against the rocks.

events.description: stops walking to observe the ocean and the beached boat
turns around to face inland and away from the ocean

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at the beached boat and the sunset over the ocean, then turning back toward land

entered.detail: rocky outcrop extending into the sea near the beached boat

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the colorful beached fishing boat resting on the sand near a rocky headland. After pausing to observe the sunset reflecting on the water, the character turns around to face inland, away from the ocean.

events.description: moves away from shoreline toward inland vegetation and ruins

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the interior along a sandy path lined with vegetation

entered.detail: green bushes and trees lining the inland path
ancient stone tower ruin visible on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the beach toward the inland area, where coastal vegetation and an ancient stone tower ruin become visible on the left. The sandy path leads back toward the rocky interior as the sun continues to set.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a confined rocky interior out to a wide coastal shoreline before returning toward ancient inland ruins. It begins with a walk along a dry, rocky path enclosed by cliffs, moving through a narrow passage that gradually opens onto a sun-drenched beach. As the terrain shifts from sand to shallow ocean water, the camera follows the shoreline past gentle waves and distant ships toward a colorful beached fishing boat resting against a rocky headland. After a brief pause to observe the sunset reflecting on the water, the perspective turns away from the sea to head back inland. The scene finally transitions from the open coast back toward the rocky interior, passing coastal vegetation and an ancient stone tower ruin as the sun continues to set.
